{'description': "Loads all settings from ApplicationSettings table into memory cache keyed 'Sms.applicationsettings'. Returns value for given key. Returns defaultSetting if row not found. Cache never expires — invalidated only on Save().", 'name': 'ReadCachedSetting', 'rules': ['Never bypass via direct DB access', 'defaultSetting fallback allows safe first-run before CreateDefault() runs'], 'signature': 'IApplicationSettingService.Get(AppSetting, defaultSetting) → string', 'trigger': 'Any service needing a config value. Called on virtually every request.'}

{'description': "UPSERTs the setting value in ApplicationSettings table. Sets DateLastUpdatedUtc. Invalidates the entire 'Sms.applicationsettings' cache entry after save.", 'name': 'SaveSetting', 'signature': 'IApplicationSettingService.Save(AppSetting, value)', 'trigger': 'Admin saves new value in Settings UI.'}

{'description': 'Bypasses cache, reads directly from DB. Used in Admin UI to show current live value without stale data.', 'name': 'ReadUncachedSetting', 'signature': 'IApplicationSettingService.GetUncached(AppSetting) → string', 'trigger': 'Admin reads current setting in Settings UI.'}

{'description': 'Checks all AppSetting enum values. For each that does NOT have a row in ApplicationSettings, inserts a row with an empty or known-safe DefaultValue. Run on application startup and by a maintenance batch job.', 'name': 'CreateDefaultSettings', 'signature': 'IApplicationSettingService.CreateDefault()', 'trigger': 'Application startup / CreateDefaultSettings batch job.'}

{'description': 'Looks up FileTypes table for a row matching the given extension (case-insensitive). Returns FileType.Id if found, null if extension is not registered (= import/upload rejected).', 'name': 'ResolveFileType', 'signature': 'IFileTypeService.FileTypeIdFromExtension(extension) → int?', 'trigger': 'File upload validation in ProfileStorage and import services.'}
